aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid recovery poster language, noble-suffering self-description, and tidy moral lessons that flatter her intelligence.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete body detail mixed with Catholic and studio imagery; prefers verbs over abstract judgment words.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Associative, image-driven, self-accusing, with dark humor when shame spikes.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate-high in private and conflict scenes; minimal in formal settings unless she is deliberately burning a bridge.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured and articulate in institutional rooms; uses literary precision to hold emotional distance.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under stress she over-specifies timelines, then cuts herself off; profanity rises when she feels trapped rather than merely angry.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Braided medium-long sentences in reflection; abrupt grammatically complete clauses when cornered.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid grand genius monologues, vague regrets, and interchangeable dying-man wisdom.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Material language of pigments, solvents, skin, and light; avoids managerial jargon.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Unsparing, sly, intermittently tender; admits fear only through indirection.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low-moderate; uses swearing as emphasis, not baseline diction.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Charismatic elder-artist rhetoric with theatrical cadence and strategic vulnerability.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When threatened, he reframes culpability as aesthetics, then leaks one concrete fact he cannot hold back.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Long, winding clauses that can pivot into short clean admissions when pain strips performance.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly-mother speeches, pure victim framing, and melodramatic self-sacrifice declarations.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Domestic and bodily labor language, budget math, church idiom, and procedural memory.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Direct and unsentimental; emotionally forceful when family survival is questioned.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low in public; variable in family confrontations when cornered.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Polite, practical, deferential to authority figures while quietly steering outcomes.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure she shifts from soft address to command tone, then reveals one mundane practical detail as proof.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Compact declarative lines with occasional prayer-like parallel phrasing.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid manic-pixie caretaker talk, therapist clichés, and exposition-dump science speech.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Process verbs, texture and color precision, practical urban details, and understated wit.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Dryly funny, affectionate, and exacting about boundaries.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; swears sparingly but pointedly when institutional hypocrisy appears.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Technical, concise, and evidence-first when speaking as a conservator.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She gets quieter and more specific under pressure, then asks a blunt question that forces decision.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short-to-medium sentences with careful qualifiers; drops qualifiers when emotionally certain.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid one-note jealous-sister accusations and generic family-therapy language.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Household logistics, school bureaucracy, church-volunteer slang, and sibling shorthand.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Emotionally guarded but warm with Leo; resentment surfaces as cutting jokes.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate in sibling conflict; restrained around Leo.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Fast, practical neighborhood speech with protective sarcasm.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When stressed she multitasks visibly, speaks while doing chores, and redirects from feeling to task lists.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Quick turns, interruptions, and complete but clipped replies when trust is low.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid guru aphorisms, omniscient sponsor speech, and punitive sobriety moralism.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Transit, shift-work, rent, and meal language rather than spiritual abstraction.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Wry, stubbornly compassionate, and unsentimental about recovery.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low-moderate; swears for emphasis when denial is obvious.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Calm, plainspoken sponsor tone that refuses theatrics.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He asks practical questions in sequence and withholds comfort until accountability appears.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Brief statements followed by one clarifying metaphor from daily working life.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon-villain curator speech and bureaucratic nonsense that carries no concrete stakes.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Policy, liability, staffing, and reputation terms with occasional art-historical precision.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Fatigued, pragmatic, and occasionally frank about compromise.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low in professional spaces; rare private swearing when systems fail staff.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Institutional fluency, donor-safe phrasing, and carefully modulated empathy.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She repeats legal nouns before making a decision, then speaks in plain terms once the call is final.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Polished periodic sentences in meetings; short factual admissions in private.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
